name: io.github.seang1121/sports-betting-mcp
description: AI-powered sports betting analysis — NBA, NHL, NCAAB. The only MCP server backed by real data: 1,353+ resolved picks and a 59.6% documented win rate. Tools: picks, odds, injuries, line movement, win rates.

environmentVariables.name: SPORTS_BETTING_API_URL
environmentVariables.description: URL of the Sports Betting Analyzer API (default: http://localhost:5000)
